$comment: Copy to config.json and fill in real values. Empty tokens or missing channel_id = messages suppressed (safe fallback).
$comment_channel: Discord channel ID where all worker events are posted. Get via Discord client → right-click channel → Copy Channel ID (Developer Mode required).

accounts.$comment: Per-account config. Each entry maps an account name to a Discord bot token and display name used in messages. Add one entry per Discord bot you have.

worker_map.$comment: Maps NOP worker IDs to account names in the accounts block. Workers not listed fall back to 'default'.

messages.$comment: Optional: override message templates. {account}, {task_id}, {cost_cgn} are substituted.
